positive: A stylized geometric arrangement of forest elements: stylized pine branches, abstract moon phases, and minimalist woodland creatures (like deer and foxes) integrated into a circular mandala design. The style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Deco and Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e), using strong, thick outlines and flat, solid color fields. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly balanced, suitable for repeating apparel print. The color palette should feature deep midnight blues, burnt ochre, sage green, and creamy ivory. The overall mood is mystical and elegant. Crisp vector art aesthetic, clean silhouette, designed for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, fuzzy, messy, low detail, gradient, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifact, distorted, grainy, JPEG artifacts
